id.description: The unique name that identifies the container.

defaultTtl.description: Default time-to-live in seconds. -1 means items never expire.

_docs.description: Addressable path for the documents resource.

_sprocs.description: Addressable path for the stored procedures resource.

_triggers.description: Addressable path for the triggers resource.

_udfs.description: Addressable path for the user-defined functions resource.
